interactions.summary: I don't think I've ever seen someone get two, two and a half million subscribers in a year, especially making a geopolitics and it's mainly geopolitics, isn't it? And history videos in a year. That's crazy. But I will tell you this. It has not changed me because being with my wife, having a family, I know my mission is to share myself with others. So I could easily create a media education company like Jordan Peterso...
